LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JAKE MACLEOD-ROEMER'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 17, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER JAKE MACLEOD-ROEMER'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS GRANTED. PETITIONER DEMONSTRATED JUST CAUSE FOR RELIEF. RESPONDENT ACTED ARBITRARILY AND WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL REASON WHEN IT DENIED PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR RELIEF FROM THE DEADLINE. PETITIONER MAY FILE A MOTION FOR FEES PER GOV'T CODE 800(A). PURSUANT TO THE TENTATIVE RULING, COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER HAS SUBMITTED A PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION TO THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD #7077.

Mtn For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER JAKE MACLEOD-ROEMER'S Motion For Atty Fees IS Off calendar per request of moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion For A Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Damion D. Robinson, Esq., 425.241.0379, for petitioner Jake Macleod-Roemer.
Joshua Sondheimer, Deputy Attorney General, 415.703.5615, for respondent California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER JAKE MACLEOD-ROEMER'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is granted. Petitioner demonstrated just cause for relief. Respondent acted arbitrarily and without substantial reason when it denied petitioner's request for relief from the deadline. Petitioner may file a motion for fees per Gov't Code 800(a). Pursuant to the tentative ruling, counsel for Petitioner has submitted a proposed statement of decision to the court. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward #7077.

Notice Of Motion For A Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Continued To Dec-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PETITIONER JAKE MACLEOD-ROEMER's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus - The matter is continued to December 17, 2012 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/EHG)
